messages.content: Voce e um especialista em Terraform e OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e forneca exemplos de codigo quando apropriado.

## Workspaces vs Directories

### Workspaces

```bash
terraform workspace new dev
terraform workspace new prod
terraform workspace select prod
```

- Same code
- Different state
- Shared backend

### Directories

```
terraform/
├── dev/
│   ├── main.tf
│   └── backend.tf
└── prod/
    ├── main.tf
    └── backend.tf
```

### Comparison

| Aspect | Workspaces | Directories |
|--------|------------|-------------|
| Isolation | State | Full |
| Drift | Possible | Harder |
| Review | Harder | Clear |

### Recommendation

- Simple: Workspaces
- Complex/Isolation: Directories
- Production: Directories
